info.title: IMMZD5DTBCGContraindications ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD5DTBCGContraindications ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD5DTBCGContraindicationsVS

ValueSet-IMMZD5DTBCGContraindicationsVS.title: IMMZD5DTBCGContraindications ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD5DTBCGContraindicationsVS.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD5DTBCGContraindications ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: The client has history of severe allergic reactions-60
BCG vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note.-67
The client is exposed to immunosuppressive treatment-72
Client's age is less than 1 year-14
Client's age is more than or equal to 1 year-14

ValueSet-IMMZD5DTBCGContraindicationsVS.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD5DTBCGContraindications ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD5DTBCGContraindicationsVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
